chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI. C.P No. D-4136 of 2025 Date Order with Signature(s) of the Judge (s) 1. For orders on Misc. No.17408 of 2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on Misc. No.17409 of 2025 (Withdrawal/A). 3. For orders on office objection No1 to 4. 4. For hearing of main case. 29.08.2025. None present for the petitioner. ************* 1. Urgency granted. 2. Counsel for the petitioner has filed withdrawal application on the ground that Sindh Government amended SCNS; therefore, he intends to file bail application before the learned trial court. In view of the above, the withdrawal application is allowed. The petitioner is at liberty to approach learned trial court for his appropriate relief. The instant petition stands disposed of JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS*
